prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your chronic illness forward
items: Create a comprehensive symptom tracking document listing all current symptoms with onset dates and severity patterns
Research and compile a list of 5-10 specialists relevant to your symptoms with their credentials, specialties, and patient reviews
Schedule and prepare for a comprehensive baseline appointment with your primary care physician to establish initial documentation
